name: M-Pesa Callback Auth Guard
description: Warn if auth is accidentally added to the M-Pesa callback route

then.prompt: The M-Pesa callback route was just edited. Verify it does NOT call getServerSession() or any auth middleware — this endpoint must remain unauthenticated so Safaricom can POST to it. Also confirm it: (1) validates the incoming payload shape before processing, (2) updates the Payment record status and sets mpesaRef, (3) is idempotent (safe to receive the same callback twice).
